What were some positive results of TARP?
qas.a:
Banks and automobile industries survived.
Lending was able to increase.

qas.q: Why did many Americans criticize TARP?
qas.a:
They believed TARP was helping businesses that deserved to fail.
They felt that TARP was only helping businesses that caused the crisis.
They believed that the economy was still in crisis.
